guide.expanded.title: Vampirism Expanded
guide.expanded.overview.text:
Vampirism Expanded adds new hunter and vampire skill trees that build on Vampirism's existing systems.
Use the other entries in this chapter to learn how each part works in practice.
guide.expanded.tasks.text:
Vampirism Expanded adds special faction quests that award skill points for the Expanded hunter and vampire trees.
These quests are meant to appear only once you have reached the end of the faction progression: hunter or vampire level 14, and lord rank 5.
If you do not see them yet, keep progressing your faction rank and lord rank before checking again.
skill.expanded.poisonous_blood.desc: Your blood becomes toxic to vampires that try to drink it.
skill.expanded.garlic_blood.desc: Your blood carries the stench of garlic. Vampires who drink from you become affected by Garlic.
skill.expanded.bat_speed.desc: Move faster while in bat form.
skill.expanded.bat_armor.desc: Greatly reduces the weaknesses of bat form.
skill.expanded.bat_liquid.desc: Remain in bat form even while submerged.
skill.expanded.vampiric_constitution.des: Your undead body resists blood exhaustion.
skill.expanded.day_walker.desc: Sunlight becomes less harmful to you.
text.expanded.faction_level_unlocker.min: Unlocked for %s at level %s or higher
